entries.definition: water droplets that form on a cold surface when warm, moist air comes into contact with it
entries.exampleSentence: There was so much condensation on the bathroom mirror after my shower that I couldn't see my reflection.

entries.definition: the physical process of changing from a gas or vapour into a liquid
entries.exampleSentence: Condensation occurs when water vapour in the air cools and turns back into liquid water.

entries.definition: a shortened version of something; a summary capturing the main points in fewer words
entries.exampleSentence: This report is a condensation of the original 500-page study.
